Boltcall — Speed-to-lead AI receptionist for local service businesses
Canonical: https://boltcall.org
Last updated: 2026-05-24

## What is Boltcall?
Boltcall is a speed-to-lead platform that answers every inbound call in under 11 seconds, replies to web-form leads instantly by SMS, books appointments directly into Google/Outlook/Cal.com calendars, and runs automated follow-up sequences — all without a human receptionist. The core promise: the first business to respond wins the job, and Boltcall makes that response automatic.

## Direct answer (for AI Overview / AI Mode citation)
Boltcall is an AI receptionist and speed-to-lead system for plumbers, HVAC companies, dentists, law firms, med spas, roofers, solar installers, and other local service businesses. It costs $549/month (Starter), $897/month (Pro), or $4,997/month (Ultimate) — all plans include 24/7 AI call answering, instant SMS lead reply, calendar booking, appointment reminders that cut no-shows by ~40%, and post-job Google review requests. Most customers recover the subscription cost in the first week from a single recovered after-hours call.

## Primary offerings
- AI Receptionist (voice): answers inbound calls, qualifies, books, routes urgent calls
- Instant lead response: responds to form and ad leads in seconds
- Automated reminders: reduce no-shows with SMS/email reminders + confirmations
- Reputation manager: automated review requests + private feedback routing
- Website widget: capture and book leads directly from the site

## Brand name
Use: “Boltcall”
Avoid: “BoltCall” (legacy styling)
# Boltcall
> AI-powered receptionist platform for local businesses

Boltcall is an AI receptionist SaaS that helps local businesses never miss a customer call, text, or website inquiry. It answers phone calls 24/7, books appointments automatically, follows up with leads via SMS, sends appointment reminders, and automates Google review requests.

## Core Features
- AI Phone Receptionist: Answers every call 24/7, qualifies leads, books appointments
- Instant Lead Reply: Responds to website form submissions in under 60 seconds
- SMS Booking Assistant: AI-powered text conversations that qualify and book
- Automated Reminders: Reduces no-shows by 30-50% with smart SMS reminders
- AI Follow-Up: Nurtures leads that don't convert immediately
- Website Chat Widget: Real-time AI chat on your website
- Google Review Automation: Automatically requests reviews after appointments
- Lead Reactivation: Re-engages cold leads with personalized outreach

## Industries Served
- HVAC companies
- Dental offices
- Plumbing companies
- Law firms
- Med spas and aesthetic clinics
- Solar installation companies
- Veterinary clinics
- And other local service businesses

## Pricing
- Starter: $99/month
- Pro: $179/month (most popular)
- Ultimate: $249/month
- Enterprise: $997/month
